description: Enhance the Makefile with any new tool targets if needed
steps: Review if any new tool targets are needed based on the new modules
acceptance_criteria: make all compiles all new modules
All new .cpp files are discovered by the Makefile's find command
verification: Run make all and make tools with zero errors
findings: No Makefile changes needed. The existing Makefile uses 'find . -name *.cpp' which auto-discovers all new .cpp files. Both make all and make tools pass with zero errors.
